Layout.meta-description: Engineering-minded Full Stack Developer focused on web systems, APIs, and business-driven technical solutions.

AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.description:
I am an engineering-minded Full Stack Developer with a previous background in process optimisation, operations, and business strategy. My degree in Industrial Engineering shaped the way I approach problems: structurally, analytically, and with a strong focus on practical solutions.

Over the last few years, I have been building end-to-end web applications, APIs, authentication flows, and database-backed systems using modern technologies such as React, TypeScript, Node.js, Supabase, and PostgreSQL. I am especially comfortable with backend logic, system flows, and translating business needs into usable technical products.

I have also worked in real delivery environments with a strong focus on architecture, deployment, third-party integrations, file storage, and full product ownership. Before moving fully into software development, I held leadership roles in operations and commercial management, which helps me understand the business context behind every product decision.

Outside work, I enjoy cycling, running, and continuous learning. I am currently looking for opportunities as a Full Stack Developer, especially within remote teams where I can contribute autonomy, logical thinking, and end-to-end execution.

pawlaroid.title: Pawlaroid
pawlaroid.description: A full-stack web platform built end to end to generate AI pet portraits. It includes authentication, data models, file storage, third-party integrations, and an architecture designed for real production use.

clipboost.title: Clipboost Video Cloud
clipboost.description: A production web platform for managing and sharing videos, along with React-based landing pages. The project was built with a strong focus on fast delivery, usability, and turning business requirements into a working technical solution.

sangreai.title: Sangre AI
sangreai.description: An AI-powered web app for interpreting blood test results. It uses the Google Gemini API to extract and process data, stores it in MongoDB, and generates a report that helps users better understand their results and take action.

ExperienceSection.title: My Experience
ExperienceSection.description-0: I have worked as a Full Stack Developer building production-ready web applications with React, Node.js, TypeScript, and Supabase. At Facturama Ltd, I built Pawlaroid end to end, including authentication, data models, file storage, and third-party integrations. I also delivered Clipboost Video Cloud and multiple React-based landing pages, working directly with stakeholders to turn business requirements into deployed technical solutions used in real environments.
ExperienceSection.description-1: At Soluciones iO, I combined web development with business thinking to build custom applications, improve processes, and support digital strategies tied to measurable outcomes. I developed solutions for real business use cases, worked closely with clients to align technology with commercial goals, and designed acquisition strategies using SEO, digital marketing, and email marketing, helping increase customer acquisition by 30%.
ExperienceSection.title-2: Commercial Director and prior operations leadership
ExperienceSection.description-2: Before moving into software development full time, I held leadership roles focused on operations, supplier management, budgeting, and public and private tenders. That stage strengthened my ability to analyse systems, reduce inefficiencies, and make decisions with a direct impact on costs, operations, and growth.

Footer.about-description: built with React & Next.js (App Router & Server Actions), Next-Intl (i18n), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn, Framer Motion, Postmark, Vercel hosting
